description: Yesware is an inbox-based sales tool that adds email tracking, templates, sequences, and scheduling to Gmail and Outlook, with Salesforce and Dynamics sync.
tagline: Email tracking and outreach for reps
overview: Yesware adds email tracking, templates, automated follow-ups, and meeting scheduling inside Gmail and Outlook, with CRM integrations to Salesforce and Microsoft Dynamics.
what_is: Yesware is a sales engagement tool that lives in the inbox. It helps reps track email opens and engagement, use proven templates, and time follow-ups, all within Gmail or Outlook so there is no separate app to learn.

It works well for individual reps, managers, and small teams that want to make email outreach more effective quickly. Setup is fast, and real-time tracking plus campaign testing help reps see what messaging earns replies.

Yesware integrates with CRMs like Salesforce and Microsoft Dynamics, fitting the stack as an email tracking and outreach layer. It is not a full CRM or support platform; it focuses on personalized, scalable sales email.
